programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To help the IMF team break up a crime syndicate that specializes in brainwashing ex-convicts into committing political assassinations, Barney substitutes for a former prisoner looking for an operation to give himself a new appearance.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest stars Gerald S. O'Loughlin and Christopher Stone portray crime syndicate bosses in charge of the waterfront who extort huge sums of money from every ship docking at a west coast port.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami discovers a map to the true location of the dragon’s nest, and Zorro puts his steel to the test against Eric the Whirlwind.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats sail headfirst into Commodore Nelson and his Marine armada. While Luffy, Sanji, and Zoro dodge cannon balls, Eric the Whirlwind prepares a sneak attack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their rescue mission taking on water, the Straw Hats get some surprising help from the great blue yonder.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After unlocking the secrets of the dragon’s nest, Luffy does battle with Eric the Whirlwind to ensure the safety of the island. Don’t mess with the rubberman!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hat crew takes a wild ride up and down a mountain only to end up in the belly of a giant whale that’s on the lookout for pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy trades blows with Laboon the whale, and Nami is distressed to learn that navigating the Grand Line is no easy feat.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A violent snowstorm batters the crew of the Going Merry, but once the Straw Hats arrive at Whisky Peak, the locals invite them to a raucous celebration.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There are bounty hunters on the prowl, and most of the Straw Hats are dead drunk. Only Zoro is still sober enough to hoist a sword.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There’s a mysterious princess that needs protection from a nose-picking assassin, but Luffy and Zoro are too busy duking it out to worry about explosive boogers.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats depart Whisky Peak on a mission to return the Princess of Alabasta to her kingdom while protecting her from an army of vicious assassins.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the crew heads for Little Garden with the princess, Luffy and Zorro’s old nemesis, Axe-Hand Morgan, escapes from a Marine prison ship.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Colby and Helmeppo train day and night to prove they’re tough enough to be Marines. A violent showdown with Vice-Admiral Garp will determine if they’re worth their salt.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s gang is running low on supplies, so they stop at Little Garden to find something to eat. Unfortunately for them, it might end up the other way around.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Not only are there dinosaurs running wild on the island of Little Garden, but the Straw Hats soon find themselves in the middle of a gargantuan grudge match.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Luffy are fascinated by the endless battle waged between Dorry and Broggy; however, fascination turns to outrage when Monkey catches a whiff of treachery.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s blood boils for revenge against the assassins who sabotaged Dorry and Broggy’s battle, but he’s currently trapped between a rock and a hard place.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy struggles to free himself, his friends fall into the hands of Baroque Works. Though the odds are against them, the Straw Hats will never give up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Zorro, and the Princess are in danger of becoming exhibits in a fiendish artist’s collection, and only Luffy can save them. But he’s busy having a cup of tea.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With his friends about to be permanently entombed in wax, Usopp is provided with the perfect opportunity to be brave and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After narrowly avoiding death, Luffy’s crew and the Princess set sail for Alabasta, but something large and dangerous looms in their path.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami comes down with a terrible fever and the Straw Hats don’t know what to do. Looks like the Grand Line might claim another victim.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats continue their quest to find a doctor for Nami. Along the way, they deal with a ravenous invader and get a chilly reception from local islanders.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Sanji make a bold trek up a snow-covered mountain in search of a witch who might hold the key to curing Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ferocious, giant, snow rabbits slow Luffy and Sanji’s progress up the mountain. Meanwhile, the former king Wapol returns to the town he abandoned.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami hovers near death while Luffy and Sanji fend off the abominable rabbits. Back at the village, Dalton leads a revolt against the dastardly Wapol.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An unlikely source acts as a roadblock to give Luffy some climbing room, and Zorro emerges from a snow bank cold, cranky, and ready to rumble

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a long journey up the mountain, Nami finally receives much-needed medical attention, but Sanji and Luffy are more interested in eating the doctor!

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon experiment to create a new hybrid warrior ends in disaster when an ancient alien evil is brought to Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A gifted Russian psychic (Shauna MacDonald) becomes a target for assassination because of her knowledge about the Taelon occupation of Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Da'an (Leni Parker) saves Lili's (Lisa Howard) life after a shuttle crash caused by a computer virus which threatens the Taelon's entire existence on Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When the Taelons mastermind the sale of an illicit weapon to trap resistance leader Jonathan Doors (David Hemblen), Lili's estranged father (Doug Lennox) is part of the scheme.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: William Boone (Kevin Kilner) and Agent Sandoval (Von Flores) defend the Taelon scientist Rho-ha (Kari Matchett), who is ordered to stand trial for murder.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons introduce interdimensional travel to human customers for the sinister purpose of harvesting them for genetic experiments.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An alien probe unleashes a devastating virus on Earth, threatening to kill both the human and Taelon races.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The resistance races against time to infiltrate a remote Taelon lab to destroy the alien probe which holds the liberation movement's secrets. Vint Cerf, “Father of the Internet”, makes a special guest star appearance.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The renegade alien Ha'gel appears on Earth to exact revenge on the Taelons for destroying his race.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When Quo'on (Brooke Johnson), the leader of the Taelon Synod is assassinated, the ruthless Zo'or (Anita La Selva) rises as successor and Captain Liam Kincaid (Robert Leeshock) emerges as a new fighter in the underground.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur (Richard Chevolleau) unwittingly puts Da'an's (Leni Parker) life at risk when he replaces him in the Taelon Commonality, causing Da'an to regress into a primitive monster the Synod wants to kill.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: After accidentally time traveling and seeing the future, Liam (Robert Leeshock) races to stop a massacre inside Resistance headquarters that was triggered by a Taelon mind-control experiment.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: When their space shuttle flight is sabotaged, Liam Kincaid (Robert Leeshock) and Augur (Richard Chevolleau) are thrown into a parallel dimension where they meet a warrior woman named Maiya (Montse Viader) who returns with them to Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur (Richard Chevolleau) is blackmailed into participating in a Taelon experiment which will turn him into a warrior specialist bio-engineered to fight the Jaridians.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: After a family is found massacred inside their Santa Claus, Georgia home, the hunt for their killer hinges on the eyewitness testimony of the three young surviving daughters.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A Thanksgiving feast turns into a family's last when a cold blooded killer brutally stabs and dismembers a couple the day after their holiday celebration.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Dayton, Ohio, is terrorized over the Christmas holiday as a string of brutal shootings have the residents wondering if they could be next.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Beloved Christmas tree farmers are executed in the front seat of their car and a manhunt for their killer is launched that keeps investigators on the case for over three decades before justice is served.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: After a woman is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a web of late-night encounters, secret lovers and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment; with a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions leading to a sadistic killer suspected by no one.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is strangled to death in the middle of a Hawaiian paradise; investigators quickly focus in on two suspects, but nothing comes easy as they spend more than a decade striving to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A retired couple are found beaten to death in their country club estate, but detectives soon discover that what happens in Vegas doesn't always stay there as they hunt down this monstrous killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed to death and suspects include a warlock and a rumored Wiccan lover; the case goes unsolved for years, until a triple homicide leads investigators to a dark obsession that costs four people their lives.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found dead in a lake; as her small town grieves, law enforcement finds itself on a 20-plus year investigation that leads to a killer who was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: An apartment fire proves to be arson set to cover up the murder of a young woman, but the discovery of a secret double life and unique evidence leads detectives to the killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A witness comes face to face with the killer of a small-town beautician, but despite having an eyewitness, it would take years and a surprise tip to lead detectives to who strangled a beloved member of the community.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old finds his great-grandparents melted, he runs for help, launching an investigation into their double murder; greed takes center stage as detectives unwind this heart-wrenching case that leads them to a suspect no one saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.desc: Country singer Tracy Lawrence stops by the shop looking to sell his 1920s Martin guitar and a colorful 1960s suit from singer-songwriter Hank Snow.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Mail To The Chief
programme.desc: A customer brings in a one-of-a-kind letter written by President Bill Clinton during his college years.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank find themselves in a high-risk situation when they are chased by a crazy emu who roams a farm in Tennessee that the boys are picking. Once they've escaped from the bird they manage to rescue a much sought-after fireplace facade.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: Determined to prove his innocence in a double-cross, Bob Lee Swagger is now in a high-tension race from every law enforcement agency in the US and a shadowy organization that wants him dead.

programme.title: Windtalkers
programme.desc: True story about members of the Navajo tribe who proudly served the U.S. in WW II as code talkers by using their native language as a code to relay information to military leaders.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Welfin, a wolf-like Chimera Ant, has realized that someone has infiltrated the palace. With his sharp sense of smell, he tracks down the intruders.

programme.title: Death Note: Matsuda
programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Death Note: Makeshift
programme.desc: L's team discovers that the Yotsuba Group meet in secret to discuss the elimination of individuals who are troublesome to their company….

programme.title: Death Note: Performance
programme.desc: The Yotsuba Group hires Eraldo Coil to uncover L's identity.

programme.title: Death Note: Guidance
programme.desc: Misa succeeds in narrowing down the Kira suspects in the Yotsuba Group to one: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note: Frenzy
programme.desc: Higuchi of the Yotsuba Group attempts to kill Matsuda of the task force, and is surprised when he doesn't die after 40 seconds.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira gains a new ability called Bites the Dust, a bomb that automatically kills anyone who tries to discover Kira’s identity through Hayato. Realizing that the only people who could stop Kira are ones with similar powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 1
programme.desc: Hayato’s attempt to kill Kira using Stray Cat’s air bullet ends in failure. Kira realizes that letting Hayato repeat the same morning is becoming a risk, so he decides to undo Bites the Dust after he sees through Rohan’s death.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke and Hayato hide inside a nearby residence to escape from Deadly Queen and Stray Cat’s attack. But to their horror, Kira is somehow able to close in on them from outside the house.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Goodbye, Morioh – The Heart of Gold
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends have finally cornered Yoshikage Kira. Refusing to give up, Kira tries to activate Bites the Dust one more time to escape his desperate situation. Can Josuke and the others stop Kira in time to save the future of Morioh?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Golden Wind
programme.desc: Amid the gritty beauty of Neapolis, the Joestar lineage lives on in Giorno Giovanna. After sidestepping long-term Joestar ally Koichi Hirose, Giorno must contend with two powerful Mafia gangsters, Leaky Eye Lucca and the enigmatic Bruno Bucciarati.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Eager to identify Leaky Eye Luca’s attacker, Bucciarati confronts Giorno and unleashes a Stand attack to dismantle him piece by piece. But Giorno counters with his Stand Golden Wind, surprising not just his adversary, but also himself.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Meet the Gangster Behind the Wall
programme.desc: Determined to join the mafia gang Passione, altruistic Giorno is introduced by Bucciarati to the grotesquely corpulent Polpo, an incarcerated capo who tests Giorno’s loyalty with a simple but bizarrely lethal test involving a lighter and its flame.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Plodding amid the dusky shadows of a peaceful piazza is Polpo’s macabre Stand, which assails any who dare witness the reigniting of the lighter. Giorno deciphers its method of attack, but is soon staring death in the face as Koichi comes to his aid.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Find Polpo's Fortune!
programme.desc: While word of the high-ranking capo Polpo’s alleged suicide sparks astonishment and speculation in the crime syndicate Passione, Giorno is inducted into Bucciarati’s eclectic mafia family. The only problem now is the vast fortune seemingly up for grabs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Sailing to the Isle of Capri to recover Polpo’s estate, Bucciarati and team are ambushed by a stealthy enemy Stand that deflates them into rubber-like human pelts. Abbacchio, however, thinks he can find his comrades and reluctantly activates his Stand.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: With only one more day remaining until the selection, Gon, Killua and Ikalgo go over their strategy.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Welfin, a wolf-like Chimera Ant, has realized that someone has infiltrated the palace. With his sharp sense of smell, he tracks down the intruders.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The battle between the humans and Chimera Ants is about to begin.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Zeno and Netero's sudden attack throws the palace into confusion. Concerned for the King's safety, Pitou and Pouf hurry to the King's side.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Youpi transforms and splits up the group with his attack. Morel lets Shoot and Knuckle handle things while he heads for the King.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: The King faces off against Netero and Zeno.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Knuckle suddenly appears before Youpi to fight him head on.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Zeno's cryptic words to Killua and Gon becomes clear when they reach the tower.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Feeling the need to lay a punch on Youpi to avenge his friend Shoot, Knuckle decides to take on Youpi once more.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter
programme.desc: Ikalgo reads Palm's hidden message, which says that she has gone to the palace and to assume that she is dead if she does not respond before the start of the mission.

programme.title: Death Note: Matsuda
programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: An assassin with a rifle is attempting to shoot the Princess who is in the royal box to wave the starting flag for the Mystic Grand Prix. However, the plot fails due to mirror reflection.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go escapes from a trap set by an assassin gang and prevents the assassination of the President of Avalonia, the next target of the assassins.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: To participate in a race in the United States, Go and Trixie board a passenger plane. Dr. Fantasty, a developer of a new type of rocket fuel, is also aboard.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: There is an ongoing mystery that unmanned cars suddenly drive away and disappear. To date, 48,000 cars have gone missing. The police request Go to track down those unmanned cars as they are not able to catch them.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go joins the Pineapple Grand Prix, a series of grueling courses. In honor of the legend that originated the race, racers are obligated to carry pineapples during the race. Then, it turns out that one of the pineapples has a stolen jewel inside.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: On a plane to Hong Kong to join a race, Go witnesses a man being murdered with a poisoned needle, but someone kills the assassin lady to seal her mouth.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go and Trixie arrive at an airport to head for Hawaii and stumble across a shooting incident aiming at a stranger man and a girl. After their arrival to Hawaii, they find the man they saw earlier dead.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Gadge is the father of Gismo, a boy Go met at a car show. Gadge has a grudge against Go as he was fired from his team after losing a race to Go, and he has devoted himself to 'car wrestling,' in which cars smash and destroy each other.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: An international space development base is under construction in the American West. In the plains, the equipment to be transported to the base has been robbed by a group called Motorcycle Apaches.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A lightening awakens the 'Monster Car,' a huge monster-like tank resting in an old castle at the foot of the Alps. The Monster Car descends into the city and runs amok bringing total destruction.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A daughter of a wealthy man, Baron Vondervon, disappeared 12 years ago. In memory of her who dreamed of becoming a racer, Vondervon decides to hold a 'Junk Car Grand Prix', in which only girls of 17 years old are eligible to participate.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: By air, Go and his fellows are on the way to the Grand Prix, but their plane breaks down due to lightning, falling onto an uninhabited island with other passengers.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go receives a challenge letter from the Car Acrobatic Team, a team that he defeated in the Alpine Race one year ago. Go heads for the designated spot although Racer X tried to stop him.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Mr. Goldminter, the richest man in the world, holds the Around the World Grand Prix. The champion will win tons of gold and his daughter, Lovelace. Upon a request, Go joins the race with his pride as a racer.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: In order to win, the racers try to sabotage the race by any means necessary. Go continues to race with his belief in fair play, but this motto comes to corner him. Go aims to reach the goal driving the Mach 5, overcoming various obstacles.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Dio the Invader
programme.desc: On a stormy night in Victorian England, a coach carrying an aristocratic family meets with disaster, forever changing the fate of its sole survivors, George and Jonathan Joestar.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: A Letter From the Past
programme.desc: Hostility grows between Jonathan and his adopted brother, Dio, as forgotten secrets emerge. Do the sinister slums of London hold the secret to the mask and Jonathan’s suspicions?

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jonathan and his new comrade, Speedwagon, confront Dio but are caught off guard when a savage reversal sends shock waves through the Joestar family.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Overdrive
programme.desc: Fate arranges the meeting of a broken Jonathan and the mysterious Zeppeli, master of Hamon energy. Meanwhile, one particularly savage vampire recruit hopes to slice his way to victory.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Dark Knights
programme.desc: Terror follows Jonathan and his fellow travelers to Windknight’s Lot, where they find themselves faced with the devious Dio. The onslaught of evil continues with two colossal knights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Tomorrow's Courage
programme.desc: Just as Jonathan’s heroism transforms one foe’s hatred into humanity, an even greater behemoth drives the crew to a knightly training camp, complete with a medieval chamber of death.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Sorrowful Successor
programme.desc: Conquering his own fear, an unlikely star opens an opportunity for Zeppeli and Jonathan. But as a prophecy from Zeppeli’s past unfolds dramatically in a clash of life, death, and succession, a true hero triumphs.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bloody Battle! JoJo & Dio
programme.desc: With sword in hand and a team of Hamon masters at his side, Jonathan sets out to save Poco’s sister. When one slithery demon makes its move, Jonathan steps in, igniting an all-out war with his “brother.”

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Final Ripple!
programme.desc: Jonathan takes Erina’s hand in marriage before embarking on a celebratory journey to America. But two stowaways unwittingly change the course of history for all those onboard.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: New York's JoJo
programme.desc: It’s 1938, and hotheaded Londoner Joseph and his grandmother, Erina, have arrived in New York, where he wastes no time brandishing his innate tendencies—especially when he learns of Speedwagon’s expedition.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Game Master
programme.desc: Bullets fly and Hamon reverberates as brassy Joseph battles the Hamon master-turned-vampire Straizo. Later, an ominous revelation pulls Joseph to Mexico.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Pillar Man
programme.desc: In search of the mysterious Pillar Man, Joseph arrives in Mexico to promising news but deadly resistance. Now the German army’s thirst for power may have awakened an unstoppable power—even for Joseph.

programme.title: Bleach: Memories of Nobody
programme.desc: Ichigo and his fellow Soul Reapers must save two worlds from annihilation.

programme.title: Bleach: The DiamondDust Rebellion
programme.desc: After the treasured Ouin is stolen, Toshiro Hitsugaya disappears and becomes suspected of treason.

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter: Phantom Rouge
programme.desc: Someone has stolen Kurapika's eyes! Gon and Killua investigate, but the Phantom Troupe is back!

programme.title: Hunter x Hunter: The Last Mission
programme.desc: The Battle Olympia begins! Gon and team attend, but The Shadow puts a deadly end to the festivities!

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Blood Prison
programme.desc: Naruto's battle to reclaim his honor begins! Naruto is convicted of a serious crime he didn't commit and is sent to the inescapable prison, Hozuki Castle.

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden the Movie: Bonds
programme.desc: Mysterious flying ninja have launched a sudden attack against the Leaf. To save their village, Naruto and his friends set out to stop this new threat.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia's venture to house a work crew in Jade City is threatened when the septic tank backs up into the drinking water.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: With cold weather settling in early and debts piling up, the crew pushes, pulls, and drags a mammoth and potentially season-saving boulder to camp.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: With the most promising boulder of the year under the saws at Wolverine, Josh and R2 crash their truck, leaving Claudia and the crew reeling.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: The lads are in South Africa in search of the greatest ocean hunters of all, shark! They've teamed up with scientists on a mission to lure these legendary predators close enough to catch them and tag them.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: It's the middle of winter and the lads are in Norway to catch the king crab. The team journey up the coast of Norway braving sub-zero temperatures and learning all they can along the way for their final mission, to dive under the ice.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: The Fishing impossible team head to Indonesia in search of one of the toughest fish in the sea, the Giant Trevally. These brutes bully sharks by head butting them into submission.

programme.title: Hunting Fish
programme.desc: Thom Hunt challenges himself to locate a rare Mirror Carp in stunning Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Hunting Fish
programme.desc: Thom Hunt challenges himself to fish wild Tuna in stunning Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Hunting Fish
programme.desc: Thom Hunt challenges himself to fish for Cod in picturesque Norway in freezing conditions.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Emotions run high for the remaining participants as they struggle to adapt to the hardships of the island. One participant wrestles with the solitude and contemplates tapping out.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Three weeks in, mental and physical struggles take their toll on the remaining participants.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A heavily pregnant woman is viciously attacked by a woman obsessed with making the unborn child her own. A couple cling to the rafters of their home as Hurricane Ike unleashes its fury on them.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A young girl is turned into a sexual slave for a self-proclaimed prophet. An idealistic young man is brainwashed by a dangerous and racist cult.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: The men travel south down the coast of Denmark getting a first hand look at World War 2 bunkers. The expedition’s main GPS fails miles from shore.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Scott takes a beating in the rough waters of the Adriatic and is showing signs of wanting to call it quits. The men get blown off the waters in Croatia and tour ancient Roman Ruins. Scott is at his breaking point.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret.

programme.desc: Matt and Froy set out to repo a truck from a wealthy Texan, but their mission backfires when the Sheriff arrives with a new arrest warrant that will send Froy away for good.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: RiffTrax: Bloody Pit of Horror
programme.desc: Filmed in PSYCHOVISION, (which we hear Fellini used to shoot in), Bloody Pit of Horror is must see Italian horror at its cheesiest. Mike, Kevin and Bill brave the spider piñata and give it their bloody best.

programme.title: RiffTrax: City Of The Dead
programme.desc: Join the former stars of MST3K on their visit to scenic City of the Dead!. Comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (former stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 aka MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fangs Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: Ease into your most practical dungeon-exploring negligee and join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Fangs of the Living Dead! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Vengeance of the Dead
programme.desc: Vengeance of the Dead is the bone-chilling tale of a young man visiting his grandpa, and several other grandpas! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Battle of the Stars
programme.desc: Olympic athletes' the Brownlee brothers, DJ Scott Mills, space scientist Dr Maggie Aderin-Pocock and sport's presenter Suzi Perry help design their own fighting robots to battle it out in the bulletproof Robot Wars arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Battle of the Stars
programme.desc: Paralympic gold medallist Kadeena Cox, international football legend Robbie Savage, presenter Neil Oliver and popstar Jordan from Rizzle Kicks help design their very own fighting robot to battle it out in the bulletproof Robot Wars arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The first heat of the Fifth Wars raises the bar for action. With newcomers outnumbering the veterans, finding out if an underdog will manage to secure a place in the finals.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One newcomer gets a forceful yet thorough tour of the arena hazards in the eliminators. Flippers prove to be this heats weapon of choice and they are put to great effect, as many robots take to the air.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The eliminators continue as more newcomers and veterans enter the arena, ready to destroy each other for the spot in the finals. One competitor's design renders their adversary's weapon useless.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: More hopefuls enter the arena, as they risk life and limb for a chance at the finals. An equally matched battle leaves the decisions to the judges, and two house robots work together to inflict some last minute damage.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Halfway through the heats and the competition is on fire, literally. The arena is out for revenge after another competitor inadvertently vandalises it. One robot commits the ultimate sin, attacking the benevolent Refbot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The house robots venture into the funeral business as they hold cremations and burials in the Robot Wars arena, to the applause of a live audience. One flip may spell doom early on for one competitor.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor achieves every flipper robot's dream in this episode's heats, rapidly ending the first round. Another robot refuses to go into the pit alone and takes down whoever they can get grip on.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor gets chopped up by competitor and house robot alike and a quick eviction from the arena makes the judge's job a simple one. A seemingly one-sided fight takes a different direction, thanks to the hazardous arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Matilda breaks the rules and strays from her zone, inflicting massive damage on unsuspecting robots, much to the dismay of the judges.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: When the competitor's weapons aren't quite doing the job, they must resort to using the arena to secure the win. There's not enough room for the both of them, which robot from the Isle of Sheppey will prove itself the best in this chance encounter.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: World Champions meet a newcomer in this episode's heat. One uneventful round leaves the house robots responsible for entertaining the crowd.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The semi-finals are here and the competitors step up a notch, even the house robots need to be cautious. One of the three losers of the first rounds have an opportunity for redemption in the Losers Melee.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: After this episode, the Grand Final lineup will be decided. With pressure mounting the robots are going all out. One competitor is sent to the clouds with the help of another. The house robots help decide who makes it to through.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team prepares for the worst as board a Wraith hive ship over Atlantis. They're surprised to find the Wraith crew in stasis when a malfunction on the hive ship releases the remaining crew… who have been cannibalizing one another for food.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Dr. Jennifer Keller is observed behaving very strangely, extensive testing reveals nothing abnormal. But McKay’s investigation leads him to suspect that Dr. Keller and Neela Casol, a notorious criminal, have switched consciousnesses.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: In an alternate universe, Detective John Sheppard is with the Las Vegas Police Department and begins to investigate a strange series of murders believed to be the work of a bizarre serial killer. Has life changed or is this a dangerous Wraith plot?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Puzzled over the hive ship's sudden departure, the team picks up a weak subspace signal in Wraith code. Once deciphered, their worst fears are realized. The Wraith message contains a familiar set of coordinates. The hive ship is on its way to Earth!

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies show up in "Bourgie Brea," and find the place fascinating; Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine; Ivy and Dave go head to head on a giant pair of sister lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave counts on his competition being unwilling to buy a big locker they need to move; Ivy and Ivy Jr. find their day somewhat therapeutic; Mary finally finds a tiny treasure to take home; Rene stands his ground to protect his honor.

programme.desc: Back in the city of Orange, Calif., the Vegas Ladies arrive in vintage style, though not everyone agrees; Casey finds the chutzpah to pick up a good unit; Darrell tries to peddle his wares to Emily, but settles for a decent locker.

programme.desc: A blue moon causes problems right after the Elders', suspicious of Leo, assign the sisters a new whitelighter. Meanwhile, Agent Brody tells Paige of a powerful new threat, and Phoebe and Leslie confess their true feelings for each other.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting for a hundred years.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: On their way to Omashu, the kids become lost in the treacherous "Cave of Two Lovers."

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang enters Omashu so he can learn Earthbending from King Bumi, but the city is in the hands of the Fire Nation!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being "connected to the Earth" from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang must clear up a wave of anti-Avatar sentiment and atone for something he did in the past.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang discovers a possible Earthbending mentor at an underground tournament.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Traveling without Uncle now, Zuko wanders alone into an Earth Kingdom town, where he bonds with a local boy. Meanwhile, Zuko is haunted by memories of his own youth.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: As the kids are pursued relentlessly by a mysterious machine, their exhaustion puts them at each other's throats.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When a young beauty queen contestant, Dina Raines (Diane Almeida), commits suicide, Sparta Police Chief Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) and Virgil Tibbs (Howard Rollins) investigate the background of the contestant and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A woman murders her wealthy, abusive husband with the help of her lover. All appear to be working according to their plan until the initial evidence points to her stepson as the main suspect; however, as more evidence emerges, the focus shifts.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Christine Rankin, the first Black female officer on the Sparta police force, is killed during the capture of a murder suspect, the city council makes plans to suspend Gillespie, but he voluntarily steps down and sets out to get justice.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: As the arrests grow, Gillespie, Tibbs and the Sparta police force are desperate to halt the spread of crack cocaine among the young people of their town, and no one is more motivated than Officer Willson Sweet, whose cousin died from using the drug.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie is let go after being abducted by white supremacists right before the upcoming visit of a civil rights leader, Rev. John Carter, and the anniversary of a historic march. Tibbs is excited to meet Carter, but Gillespie anticipates trouble.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While out on his morning jog, Jesse unsuccessfully attempts to save a man who has locked himself in his gargage with the engine running, an apparent suicide.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: After Madison hears that Lisa, a personal friend and one of her star students, has missed a few classes, she visits her and finds Lisa comatose from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a case of mistaken identity when Greg, a mobster who looks just like Mark, is released from prison and moves into Mark's neighborhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse operates and removed the bullet from Greg, thinking he is Mark. But everything starts to unfold when mark show up for his shift at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark's patient and shock-jock radio talk show host Denise announces her nation-wide search for her birth mother and jokes that she'll kill her if she doesn't want anything to do with her.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A woman is murdered during the burglary of her opulent Malibu home, a burglary in which a rare diamond, part of a set of famous Russian jewels known as The Seven Deadly Sins, is stolen.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As preparations for the hospital's Christamas party swing into high gear, Claude, a popular hospital maintenance man, who each year portrays Santa Claus at the big bash, collapses.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: In this follow-up to 'Even Nice People,' Gillespie’s daughter, Lana Farran, continues to defend her home from her mother’s greedy ex-boyfriend Carl DeLissa and the mob who are willing to go to great lengths to acquire and develop it, even murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Harriet DeLong’s son Eugene teams up with a prison pastor, Bishop William Prinn, to get his father, Vic Glendon, off death row, but when Prinn is traveling to Sparta, he finds his life is in danger when his car is run off the highway by a stranger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Althea Tibbs is raped by a fellow teacher, the Sparta police find it difficult to get a conviction because the man's loyal wife has given him an alibi. Virgil desperately wants to avenge Althea's assault and is forced to a near-breaking point.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The multi-angled roof has been framed. A remote-controlled skylight is installed. Mini duct system is discussed. The homeowner's mother makes a glass mosaic table. Rotted wood gutter is replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New material is used for the house's exterior trim. Kevin visits a window restoration shop. Radiant floor heating is installed in the garage. The homeowners tile the basement bathroom.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The roof gets different types of underlayment. An oak mantle is installed. Brickwork is corrected. The old boiler is disassembled. Exterior clapboards are painted inside. A linear drain is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A composite deck is installed. The basement gets insulated. Unconventional HVAC zoning is discussed. Kevin tours a stove factory in Reading, PA. Solar panels and their backup system are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The master bathroom gets a plaster treatment. Windowsills are replicated in Dracut, MA. A kitchen garden, recessed lighting, and floating countertop are installed. New wood floors change directions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1880s Country Cape is finished. The cast arrives and reflects on the changes that have been made since Charlie's crew started work. The homeowners take Kevin and Tommy on a tour of the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's a new project. We meet a new builder Deliandro and homeowners Robyn and Derek in the West Roxbury section of Boston. Robyn gives a tour. Derek is an architect and drew the construction plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The inside is demo'ed. Beams are installed to replace a load-bearing wall. A willow is pruned, and house wrap is installed. The homeowners select kitchen cabinets. A wider window opening is created.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Outside, windows are trimmed with PVC, and the house gets sided with fiber cement clapboards. An American Elm resistant to Dutch Elm disease is planted. Inside, a drainpipe puzzle is solved.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Ipe is installed on the front porch. A heat pump coil is added to the existing furnace. Back at the house, a brick patio is built. At the Dracut Centre School, original corbel replicas are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old front steps are replaced. The homeowners decide on interior flooring. Kevin visits a trade school. Cable railing and new door are installed out back, and a brick walkway out front.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Lighting is being installed outside and preparation for in-floor heat is happening in the primary bathroom. The homeowners pick lighting for the dining room and father and son install drywall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original foundation is repaired. Antique windows are installed in Dracut, MA. The wood floors are patched, and a bathroom is prepped for tile. Aluminum gutters that look like wood are explored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Cabinets and a vent hood are being installed in the kitchen. The homeowners' daughter chooses a paint color for her room. A stained glass window is repaired, and floor tiles are laid out for install.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Countertops are going in and doors are being hung. A local stone fabrication shop is visited. A distressed stained finish is applied to trim. Under-cabinet receptacles and crown molding are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A little over a year ago, the 1890s West Roxbury Victorian was a tired-looking house. Now, it's all dressed up and looking good. The crew and homeowners give a tour of the changes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The team is starting a new project in Saratoga Springs, NY. They meet the homeowners and the builder. Plans for the 1864 home include reconstructing the additions and creating an open floor plan.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowners begin to demo. The architect shares his plan for the home. Richard learns about the Saratoga springs. The yard is protected against construction. An air remediation system is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The Saratoga Racecourse is toured. Discoveries are made during demo. Armored shield cabling is replaced with nonmetallic ones. The home's framing is explored. A buttress wall is built in the basement.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Local gardens are toured. A new foundation is built using ICFs. A mansion once owned by the inventor of a fire hydrant valve is toured. Forms are prepped for a pour-in-place concrete staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original foundation is repointed. Plumbing fixture choices are made. A ledger is installed on the new ICF foundation for the mudroom floor joists. A truss manufacturing facility is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Brick veneer is installed at the Dracut Centre School. The homeowners select cabinets at a local kitchen showroom. Mold and mildew are identified and treated. Kevin takes a hot air balloon ride.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old joists are replaced. Tile selections are made. The old porch is tied into the new framing. Steel I-beams support the open floor plan with no partitions. The roof trusses are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Coffered ceilings hide plumbing pipes. A central staircase being constructed. A drain plain is created for the porch, and a diffusion vent is installed on the roof. The crew ends the day on the ice.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The house has undergone a dramatic transformation. The electrical and HVAC service is upgraded. An old window gets new life. Kevin is taught welding. The house is ready for insulation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A wet tap is performed for the run of new water lines. A fire sprinkler system and slate hearth are installed inside. Doghouse dormers are made watertight and sided.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A tech school is visited. At the house, floors are going down. A custom drain pan is built for the laundry room. The new irrigation system is discussed. The ICF foundation gets a stucco-like finish.
